channel.title: 24 Days of Hanzi on Keyboard And Me
channel.description: Recent content in 24 Days of Hanzi on Keyboard And Me

item.title: 24 Days of Hanzi
item.description:
Preface Link to heading

24 Days of Hanzi for Christmas 2020, originally published in Twitter.

Day 1 Link to heading

#24DaysOfHanzi е’–

Have you noticed that е’– is pronounced kДЃ in е’–е•Ў(kДЃfД“i, coffee), and gДЃ in е’–е–±(gДЃli, curry)?

I didn’t notice until yesterday, though I already knew. Human brains are funny devices.

The word е’–е–± doesn’t sound much like the English “curry”, to the point that for long I’ve had a misconception that garlic means е’–е–±. Now that I know е’–е–± is the phonetic translation of the Tamil word “kari”, I feel much better. Though I still don’t know why it has to be “gДЃ”.
